Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens rather than wild-caught to support conservation. Buy from reputable breeders who can provide the spider's age and feeding history. Consider starting with a juvenile (1-2" leg span) rather than a tiny sling, as they're hardier and easier to care for but still allow you to watch them grow.
